name: Nachos Schulz
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Chili beans in chili gravy
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Mash the beans with half a cup of picante sauce until well mixed. Grease two 9" x 13" baking pans. Place half the chips in each pan, then spoon the bean mixture over them. Sprinkle grated cheese on top. Bake for about 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbling. Meanwhile, peel, pit, and mash the avocado. Mix it with lemon juice, half a cup of sour cream, grated onion, and tablespoon picante sauce. Garnish the nachos with the guacamole, remaining sour cream, scallions, tomato, and olives.
